'''''Star Wars: Ask Yoda''''' is a game developed by [[Amplified Games]] and published by [[THQ]] Wireless for mobile phones exclusively through Cingular on [[April 2]], [[2005]].

{{Game-stub}}

==Gameplay==
Players can watch [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] do various things, interact with him or ask him various questions, similar to a Magic 8-Ball. The game's appearance is based on the ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars]]'' series.<ref name="GameSpot" />

Yoda can be seen doing various daily activities, like eating, training, cooking and meditating, with different behaviors every day, including giving special messages on ''[[Star Wars]]'' holidays. If the player asks him a question (e.g. ''Star Wars''-related), he is interrupted, and can provide one of about 220 lines of dialogue.<ref name="GameSpot" />

==Development==
The game was initially developed for Flash Lite in one or two days, while the J2ME version took months to complete.<ref name="Atomic Giraffe">{{WebCite|url=http://www.atomicgiraffe.com/Mobile.aspx|text=Mobile|work=Atomic Giraffe Studios|archivedate=20210128113443}}</ref> The game was praised, holding an 8.3/10 on GameSpot based on 22 ratings. Stephen Palley covered the game, praising the "practically larger than life" experience and was amused by Yoda's aerobics routine with his [[Gimer stick|walking stick]].<ref name="GameSpot" />
